##NAMES=Armalcolite
##RRUFFID=R110188
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Mg,Fe^2+^)Ti_2_O_5_
##LOCALITY=Synthetic
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Hexiong Yang
##DESCRIPTION=Transparent euhedral single crystal, synthesized at 1223 deg C with K2WO4 flux. Reheated to 1400 deg C for 5 hours, and quenched. The Mg and Ti are disordered. Crystals were used in the Yang and Hazen (1998) & the Liermann et al (2006) studies.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110188
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Mg_0.995(6)_Ti_2.005(5)_O_5_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.7597 b: 9.9789 c: 3.7478 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 365 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
